rationale: The citing-paper note explicitly states it reanalyzes six published mediation studies and names “Yan and Muthukrishnan” as a case where full mediation is inconclusive or rejected, which strongly suggests substantive use of this 2014 JMR article rather than a generic mention. Given this paper is used in the empirical demonstration/reanalysis portion of the method, it is plausibly important for relation assessment. The DOI match (10.1509/jmr.12.0230) confirms the specific linked reference.
